title: Advertisement for Manpower Pooling. LMAs may advertise for
content: 16 manpower pooling, subject to prior approval of the Department and compliance with the 17 following conditions: 18 19 a. The advertisement shall indicate the phrases “for manpower pooling only”, “no 20 fees in any form and/or purpose will be collected from the applicants”, and 21 “beware of illegal recruiters and human traffickers”, using large font in the 22 advertisement; and 23 24 b. The advertisement shall specify the name, address, and DMW license number 25 of the agency, name and worksite of the prospective or accredited 26 principal/employer, and the skill categories and qualification standards. 27 28
